nasb.text: over the entrance, and to the inner house, and on the outside, and on all the wall all around inside and outside, by measurement.

esv.text: to the space above the door, even to the inner room, and on the outside. And on all the walls all around, inside and outside, was a measured pattern.

cnv.text: 在內殿門口上面的外牆，以及內殿和外殿周圍的牆上，按著尺寸，

ccb.text: 殿的入口和里外四周的墙也按尺寸镶着木板。
